name: Crunchy Orange Yogourt Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Bran Flakes or Corn Flakes, slightly crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cereal, coconut, and margarine (juice concentrate) in a large bowl. Press onto bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate.
2. Bake at 350 degrees for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool completely.
3. Dissolve jello powder in boiling water. Blend in yogurt. Chill until slightly thickened, about 1 hour.
4. Beat jello in a small mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
5. Drain orange sections; arrange on pie shell. Reserve a few for garnish.
6. Pour yogurt mixture into pie shell and chill until firm.
7. Garnish with reserved orange sections.
